title: lean 02_1 public surface entry packaging
goal: Create or tighten one readable Start Here public-entry surface for the lean 02_1 multimodal PPT stack so another agent can find the right deck, matrix, handoff bundle, review indexes, and local external-tool references without re-deriving the routing model.
why: The tool-facing surfaces are already in place, but they are spread across multiple references. Public Surface Architect should package these into a simpler navigational surface without changing contracts, scripts, or ownership boundaries.

constraints.notes: Use current local truth only. Local slides-grab clone may be referenced as a donor surface, but no sibling-workspace files may be modified or staged from there.

non_goals.description: Do not change owner-family semantics, skill routing, MCP lifecycle ownership, or bundle contracts.
Do not modify decks, renders, scripts, or machine-readable manifests.
Do not do git commit, push, or PR work in this packet.

done_definition: A single Start Here public-entry document exists or the current review index is tightened so another agent can discover the lean 02_1 stack in one pass.
The entry surface links the current local truth artifacts: v1 review index, v2 review index, page-link guide, handoff guide, and current deck outputs.
The entry surface explicitly links the local slides-grab clone and skills as donor/reference surfaces and keeps upstream GitHub as provenance only.
No contracts, scripts, manifests, or deck assets are modified.
The result clearly states that toolization remains owned by Control-Plane Program Steward while readable entry packaging belongs to Public Surface Architect.
If this packet leaves repo-local uncommitted changes inside allowed paths, the next step is TASK-LEAN-02_1-GIT-HANDOFF-V2; if it leaves no such changes, the chain ends with a no-op report.
handoff_notes: If a new Start Here doc is not necessary, tighten the existing v2 review index instead, but keep the same boundary: readable entry surface only, no tool-contract edits. Local donor surface to reference: /Users/jaehyuntak/Desktop/Project_____현재_진행중인/vscode-markdown-review-surface/control/team/resources/external_repos/slides-grab. Upstream provenance only: https://github.com/vkehfdl1/slides-grab. Chained instruction: invoke TASK-LEAN-02_1-GIT-HANDOFF-V2 only when this packet leaves relevant repo-local changes in allowed paths; otherwise report no-op and stop.
stop_conditions: Stop if the task starts to require manifest, script, or deck changes.
Stop if local truth appears inconsistent and would need control-plane reinterpretation.
Stop if the only available improvement is cosmetic wording without navigational value.
failure_guide: If the public entry surface cannot be improved without reopening tool contracts or deck content, stop and report that the work belongs back to Control-Plane Program Steward.
report_format: Return the chosen public entry surface, updated links, any skipped linkages, and explicit confirmation that no scripts/manifests/assets were modified.
